normalization: The public model page was reduced to two bounded model-level capability statements and excludes self-reported benchmark conclusions.
rights_note: Only short factual paraphrases and page section locators are retained; showcase media and marketing copy are excluded.

items.normalized_evidence: ByteDance's model page identifies Seedance 2.0 as a unified audio-video generation model that accepts text, image, audio, and video inputs.
The model page says image, audio, and video references can guide performance, lighting, shadow, and camera movement at the model-description level.

notes: This capture does not support API limits, provider availability, pricing, or independent quality claims.
